description_long: This motorcycle features a sleek, modern design with a matte black finish and prominent metallic components. The frame is streamlined, with a large cylindrical engine block and exposed mechanical details, giving it a robust and industrial appearance. Both wheels are large with thin spokes, and the tires are designed for urban road use. The seat is compact and slightly raised at the rear, with a small tail section and a visible exhaust pipe on the right side. The handlebars are straight and wide, equipped with standard controls and mirrors. The overall build suggests a focus on performance and style, suitable for city commuting or urban cruising.
description: A matte black, modern motorcycle with a streamlined frame, large spoked wheels, and exposed mechanical details, designed for urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, large spoked wheels, engine block, and exhaust pipe.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the headlight, handlebars, and narrow profile of the motorcycle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the engine, seat, and rear wheel details.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the tail section, rear wheel, and exhaust alignment.
